creator: floripa@zoing.net
text:
It fails on compilation

Fix: 

I fixed the same way as Mike Squires <mikes@ct980320-b.blmngtn1.in.home.com> did.
Look at:

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=187859+189940+/usr/local/www/db/text/2001/freebsd-ports/20010527.freebsd-ports

At least it worked for me! =)
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/smbfs
make install
